raw_input: Write an e-commerce product description (80–120 words) for a camping wool blanket. Key facts to convey: 100% Merino wool, 1.2 kg weight, 150×200 cm, naturally odor-resistant, machine-washable in cold water. Target audience: outdoor enthusiasts who value quiet quality over flash. Tone: grounded and concrete, not salesy. Do NOT use bullet points. Do NOT use superlative marketing language ('unleash', 'revolutionary', 'game-changing', 'ultimate', 'best-in-class'). Write as if for a thoughtful gear-review site.
success_criteria: mentions Merino wool, 1.2 kg, and 150×200 cm dimensions
mentions odor-resistant and machine-washable in cold
constraints: no superlatives from the forbidden list
